title: challenge_md
From Burnout to Balance: The founding team at Lumen was **running on empty**. Deadlines were slipping, two senior designers were close to quitting, and the founders hadn't taken a real day off in months.\n\nThey didn't need another productivity hack — they needed to change their relationship with work.

title: approach_md
From Burnout to Balance:
We ran a three-month engagement combining:

1. **Weekly 1:1 coaching** with the two founders
2. **Two team workshops** on boundaries and sustainable focus
3. A simple daily grounding practice the whole team could share

The goal was steadier energy, not more hustle.

title: results_md
From Burnout to Balance:
By month three the team had reclaimed their evenings and rebuilt trust.

- Stress scores dropped sharply on the team pulse survey
- Focus time tripled with protected deep-work blocks
- **Nobody quit** — and two people were promoted

title: testimonial_md
From Burnout to Balance: > Maya gave our team the language and the space to slow down without losing momentum. It changed how we work.
